# Container Market GR

> We sell and rent our own shipping containers in Greece — direct from Logiworkpass P.C.
> Not a third-party marketplace. Bilingual: Greek (default) + English (client toggle, localStorage key `cm-locale`).

## Site

- Production URL: https://containermarket.gr
- Vercel URL: https://conteiner-market.vercel.app
- Stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase (listings + CRM leads)
- Version: 1.0.0
- AI guide (this file): /llms.txt
- Short pointer: /ai.txt

## Main routes

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| / | Home — hero search, featured listings carousel, categories, stats |
| /agora | Buy containers (our inventory, sale) |
| /polisi | Sell your container to us (buyback) |
| /enoikiasi | Rent our containers |
| /enoikiasis-xoron | Storage space rental |
| /listings | Full catalog — sale & rent, 3D carousel, filterable |
| /listings/{slug} | Individual listing — Product JSON-LD, photos, price, bilingual |
| /epikoinonia | Contact form → CRM leads, email, phone, coverage |
| /help | FAQ (JSON-LD FAQPage) — how to search, buy, rent, contact |
| /oroi | Terms of use (EL + EN) |
| /aporrito | Privacy policy / GDPR (EL + EN) |
| /cookies | Cookie policy (EL + EN) |
| /epistrofes | Returns & withdrawal policy (EL + EN) |

Redirects:
- /prosfores → /listings

Blocked (robots):
- /admin/* — CRM admin (login required, Supabase Auth)

## Language

- Default UI: Greek (el)
- English: toggle in nav (ΕΛ / EN) — same URLs, no /en/ prefix
- Legal, service pages, FAQ, listings descriptions support both locales
- Server HTML metadata defaults to Greek; title/description update client-side when EN is selected

## Listings search (filters)

Hero search and catalog use query parameters on `/listings`:

- `deal` — `sale` (buy) or `rent` (lease). Omit for all types.
- `size` — container size prefix from listing type, e.g. `20ft`, `40ft`, `45ft`.

Examples:
- /listings?deal=sale
- /listings?deal=rent&size=20ft
- /listings?size=40ft

Do NOT use `/listings?q=` — there is no free-text search parameter.

Home anchor: `/#prosfores` scrolls to the featured carousel on the home page.

## Listings data

- Primary source: Supabase `listings` table (fallback: static JSON)
- Active listings only on public site (`active = true`)
- Fields: id, slug, type, condition, price, priceFormatted, unit, location, listingType (sale|rent), stockCondition (new|used), isOffer, images, description
- Bilingual fields: conditionEn, locationEn, descriptionEn, unitEn
- Detail page: /listings/{slug} — Product + Offer JSON-LD
- Example listing: /listings/20ft-dry
- All slugs in /sitemap.xml
- Images: Supabase Storage bucket `listing-images` or external URLs

## Services (business model)

1. **Buy (Αγορά)** — customer purchases our containers at /agora and /listings?deal=sale
2. **Rent (Ενοικίαση)** — customer rents our containers at /enoikiasi and /listings?deal=rent
3. **Sell to us (Πώληση)** — we buy containers from customers (buyback) at /polisi
4. **Storage space (Ενοικίαση χώρου)** — at /enoikiasis-xoron

## Contact

- Email: support@logiworkpass.com
- Phone: see /epikoinonia
- Coverage: Greece nationwide
- Company: Logiworkpass P.C.
- Contact form on /epikoinonia saves leads to Supabase CRM

## Crawling & structured data

- robots.txt: /robots.txt — allows public routes + /llms.txt + /ai.txt; disallows /admin/
- sitemap: /sitemap.xml — all public routes + every active listing slug
- JSON-LD:
  - Home: Organization + LocalBusiness + WebSite + SearchAction
  - /listings: ItemList of Products (each with url)
  - /listings/{slug}: Product + Offer per listing
  - /help: FAQPage

## Recommended agent workflow

1. Read this file (/llms.txt) for routes and filters
2. Fetch /sitemap.xml for complete URL list
3. For inventory: GET /listings or filter by deal/size; for one item: GET /listings/{slug}
4. Example listing URL: /listings/20ft-dry
5. For user questions: /help FAQ first, then /epikoinonia for contact
6. Prefer Greek for Greek users unless English is requested

## CRM (admin — not public)

- /admin/login — Supabase Auth (email/password)
- /admin — dashboard, listings CRUD, leads, settings, photo upload
- Not indexed; blocked in robots.txt

## Still pending / optional

- Custom domain containermarket.gr DNS → Vercel (if not live yet)
- Final phone number on /epikoinonia
- Tax ID (ΑΦΜ) on legal pages
- Public REST/MCP API for third-party integrations

## For developers

- Conventions: AGENTS.md
- i18n: `src/lib/i18n/messages/` (el.ts, en.ts)
- Listings filters: `src/lib/utils/listing-filters.ts`
- Legal content: `src/lib/content/legal-el.ts`, `legal-en.ts`
- SEO: `src/lib/seo/metadata.ts`, `src/app/sitemap.ts`, `src/app/robots.ts`
